description: This image displays two logos and text on a white background, representing the European Union and the Copernicus programme. On the left is the flag of the European Union, a blue rectangle featuring 12 yellow stars arranged in a circle. In the center, in grey uppercase text, are the words "PROGRAMME OF THE EUROPEAN UNION". On the right is the Copernicus logo, which consists of a stylized blue 'C' forming an arc, encompassing the word "Copernicus" in blue text with a yellow dot above the 'i'. Below the main "Copernicus" text, the tagline "Europe's eyes on Earth" is written in smaller blue letters.
